projects.name: Social Distance Detector
projects.description: Deep learning model for real-time social distancing detection using YOLO-COCO (80+ objects), with Euclidean distance-based compliance monitoring. Built with computer vision and object detection.

projects.name: Hate Speech Detection on Tweet
projects.description: NLP-based app for detecting hate speech in tweets. Data from 10+ Kaggle Twitter Sentiment datasets; EDA, count-vector features, deployed with Streamlit on Heroku.

projects.name: WhatsApp Chat Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed WhatsApp chat data for insights: visualization, text analysis, chat patterns, message frequency, active hours, and engagement metrics.

projects.name: Code Scraper Black Box
projects.description: Web scraping tool that automates Google searches, extracts code snippets from sites like GeeksforGeeks using requests and BeautifulSoup, and outputs organized results to out.txt.
